# Euphorie

> AI Agent Command Center

Euphorie is an AI agent platform that gives users a unified command center to interact with multiple specialized AI agents. Built for people who want AI that actually does things, not just chats.

## Agents

- ATLAS: Strategic planning and decision support
- CIPHER: Code generation, debugging, and technical analysis
- ORACLE: Research, data synthesis, and knowledge retrieval
- HERALD: Communications, writing, and content creation
- SENTINEL: Security monitoring, threat assessment, and system oversight

## Platform

- Web: https://euphorie.com
- iOS: Available on App Store
- Android: Available on Google Play
- Powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash and Claude Sonnet

## Company

- Built by Crene, Inc.
- Founded by Stephen Lee
- Website: https://euphorie.com
- Support: https://euphorie.com/support.html
